title: SRM School of Law Appoints Prof (Dr) YSR Murthy as Pro Vice-Chancellor
description: Professor YSR Murthy has taken over as the Pro Vice Chancellor, School of Law, SRM Institute of Science and Technology. He was the Founding Vice Chancellor and Founding Dean, School of Law at RV University, Bengaluru from 2020-24. He went on to serve as the Vice Chancellor, Assam Royal Global University between 2024-25.A civil servant turned educator, Dr Murthy has over four decades of experience in higher education, human rights, media and non-governmental organisations, both at the national an
